_changelog: Added: stripe, intercom, sentry, amplitude, mixpanel, klaviyo, webflow, ahrefs, semrush, meta-ads, brevo. Restored: todoist, granola from backup. Added 48 Horizon-hosted MCP servers: activecampaign, adobe-analytics, apollo, beehiiv, buffer, calendly, carta, clearbit, customer-io, dataforseo, demio, dub, g2, ga4, google-ads, google-search-console, hotjar, hunter, instantly, keywords-everywhere, kit, lattice, lemlist, linkedin-ads, livestorm, loops, mailchimp, mention-me, onesignal, optimizely, paddle, partnerstack, pave, plausible, postmark, reddit-ads, resend, rewardful, rippling, savvycal, segment, sendgrid, snov, tiktok-ads, tolt, trustpilot, typeform, wistia. Moved to oauth_required_servers.json (need OAuth/Composio): ga4, google-ads, google-search-console, linkedin-ads, carta, hotjar, snov, trustpilot.
